response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has roughly 20 years of broad engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling at re:cinq, which partially meets the 15-year experience floor. However, the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized, demonstrated AI platform expertise, strategic customer advisory capability, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field — none of which the resume evidences. His background is predominantly hands-on full-stack and systems engineering at Senior/Staff IC level, with only nascent AI involvement (MCP tooling, agentic workflows) that began in 2025. There is no track record of advising enterprise customers on AI/cloud strategy, building widely-adopted AI products, or operating at the scope this principal-level role requires.
strengths: Over 20 years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, infrastructure, and low-latency systems — well above the 15-year minimum.
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly aligned with the role's AI focus.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak through founding GISCollective and delivering an open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field; highest credential is a BS in Computer Science, which puts him below the preferred qualification bar for a director-level AI strategy role.

No evidence of strategic advisory experience with enterprise customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption — the resume shows execution-focused engineering, not thought leadership or customer-facing strategy.

AI involvement is recent (2025) and tactical in scope; there are no demonstrated large-scale AI products, published research, conference keynotes, or other signals of recognized expertise in the AI space.

key_factors.factor: Nascent but relevant AI agent work
No recognized AI expertise or advanced degree
